case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. RUDY MARIEL MAGANA PACHECO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACHECO, RUDY MARIEL MAGANA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,725.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $23.14 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, RUDY MARIEL MAGANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,977.35 AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, RUDY MARIEL MAGANA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00 - SERVED MAY-10-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, RUDY MARIEL MAGANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SANTA CASTILLO ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT RUDY MARIEL MAGANA PACHECO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, RUDY MARIEL MAGANA
